steps.title: Read the function value from the graph at x = 6
steps.content:
Locate $x = 6$ on the horizontal axis, then trace vertically to where it intersects the curve. The corresponding $y$-value is $2$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice B, 2, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore B is correct.
